assertions.name: M9_8_list_no_profiles_shows_creation_hint
assertions.evidence:
{"name": "M9_8_list_no_profiles_shows_creation_hint", "ok": true, "exit_code": 0, "text_excerpt": "No model profiles configured.

Create one with the CLI (apiKey is required):
  mossen --add-model-profile <name> \
    --provider openai-compatible \
    --baseURL <url> \
    --model <id> \
    --apiKey <key>

Then activate it as the global default:
  mossen --set-model-profile <name>"}
